seoTitle: How to Connect Power BI to Google Analytics for Marketing
metaDescription: Learn how to connect Power BI to Google Analytics so marketing metrics like traffic and campaign performance become easy-to-read dashboards.
intro: Google Analytics holds valuable insight into user behavior and campaign performance, but its native interface isn't always the easiest way to explore that data alongside everything else. This guide walks through connecting Power BI to Google Analytics so marketing data becomes part of your regular reporting. It's built for marketers and analysts who want a clearer, more customizable view of their traffic and engagement metrics.

steps.heading: Connect Power BI to Google Analytics
steps.body: In Power BI Desktop, use Get Data, search for the Google Analytics connector, and sign in with the account that has access to the property you want to report on.

steps.heading: Pull key metrics
steps.body: Select the specific views, dimensions, and metrics you need, such as sessions, users, or conversion data, rather than importing everything available.

steps.heading: Troubleshoot connection issues
steps.body: If the connector fails to load data, check account permissions on the Google Analytics side and confirm you're signed into the correct account within Power BI.

steps.heading: Automate your reports
steps.body: Set up scheduled refreshes through the Power BI service so your marketing dashboard reflects recent traffic and campaign data without manual updates.

steps.heading: Apply best practices for visualization
steps.body: Group related metrics together, like acquisition and engagement, so the report tells a clear story rather than listing disconnected numbers.

faq.question: Do I need Google Analytics 4 or does this work with older versions too?
faq.answer: Compatibility depends on the specific connector version in Power BI, so it's worth confirming which Google Analytics platform version your connector supports before connecting.

faq.question: How much historical data can I pull into Power BI from Google Analytics?
faq.answer: The amount of historical data available depends on Google Analytics' own data retention settings and any limits imposed by the connector or your account permissions.

faq.question: Can multiple people view the same Google Analytics dashboard in Power BI?
faq.answer: Yes, once published to the Power BI service, the report can be shared with others, though each underlying data connection may still require appropriate access.

faq.question: Will connecting Power BI to Google Analytics affect my website's tracking?
faq.answer: No, this connection only reads existing analytics data and has no effect on how your website or app collects tracking data.
